intro: Scolosanthus triacanthus is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "three-thorned melastome." This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with fever and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
